Barodreth Firefingers  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded July 24th, 2007

  • This mob spawns at +713, +682, +35 right next to Nolusia Finharn which is on the find tool CTRL-F..
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2021-05-30 18:01:30.

Level: 70
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2025-10-22 08:50:49
Known Loot:
Fine Silk
Items Given:
Enchanted Gloves Pattern
Enchanted Robe Pattern
Enchanted Sleeves Pattern
Enchanted Bracer Pattern
Enchanted Trousers Pattern
Enchanted Sandals Pattern
Enchanted Cap Pattern [ID 22583]

Known Habitats:
  Erudin Palace
Factions Increased:
  The Dead +251
Factions Decreased:
  Faydarks Champions -150
  King Tearis Thex -251
  Keepers of the Art -1005
Quests:
  Craft Keeper Bracer
  Craft Keeper Cap
  Craft Keeper Final Task
  Craft Keeper Gloves
  Craft Keeper Robe
  Craft Keeper Sandals
  Craft Keeper Sleeves
  Craft Keeper Trousers

Report a correction

# Jun 26 2016 at 11:08 AM Rating: Good
drool

well
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2014 at 12:50 AM Rating: Decent
fronglo
Scholar
4,445 posts
Was killing guards to get heretic faction on my 61 shadowknight. This guy attacked me and was even con. I attacked him for a decent amount of time and only got him down 1% health. I left the zone.
____________________________
Hi
▲ Page top
Craft Keeper Armor
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2012 at 1:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971921945
36 posts
The armor all requires Woven Spider Silk. I found that it is a medium rare drop and it only drops off the 'widow' variety spiders. It will drop off any of the widows though: the spiderlings, the large widows, and the giant widows (any with 'widow' in the name). It is fairly easy to kill every widow in Toxxulia and still not have enough silk to make all the gear and have other less useful creatures spawn and place-hold the spawning spots where new widows ought to be respawning into the zone. So... You will probably have to go to Greater Faydark to hunt more widows. And luckily there are tons of them. I found a particularly large quantity of them to the east of the entrance to Crushbone, specifically just east of the orc camp on that side.

Whether you are fighting it out on an emulated server or ignoring the defiant armor and choosing the old-fashioned route: Good Luck!
▲ Page top
downed
QuoteReply
# May 08 2009 at 3:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592781500813
1 post
Parsed him. So here's the data.

Barodreth Firefingers in 2053s, 1993k @971dps --- Iksurmunky + pets 1993k @971dps (100%)
at 1k dps took me 34 minutes. this guy nearly has 2m hp!
all he dropped was fine silk

faction hits are as follows:
Keepers of the Art got worse
King Tearis Thex got worse
Faydarks Champions got worse
The Dead got better

so i think the factions listed are wrong.
▲ Page top
These quests..
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2005 at 8:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591821580639
Scholar
63 posts
.. as the other newb quests are quite fun and a relaxing change of pace. Also can net you some decent items for your level is you are playing non-twink, (which I like to do).

Gathered all* the components needed for all the pieces in about 30-40 minutes.

Tho!

*= The woven spider silk is a big pita. Killed all the creepy crawlies I could find for an hour. I got 2 so far =(. Might have to check out other places than Tox..

-Yc
▲ Page top
RE: These quests..
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2006 at 1:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591786943215
View User Forum
62 posts
woven drops much more and easily in GF.. just kill any and all spiders between crushbone and 1st Lift of Kelethin... will get you all the woven spider silk you need
▲ Page top
RE: These quests..
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2012 at 1:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971921945
36 posts
True. GFay is the place to be. There is barely enough woven spider silk in Tox to craft two pieces of the armor. (Unless you keep killing pretty much everything in the zone to get the widows to keep spawning. When I was hunting I kept killing just the widows and the more you do this the less there are to hunt because different things pop from the same spawn sites. I had the entire zone respawned at one point and there was not a widow to be found because I had filtered through them all.)
▲ Page top
Location

# Jun 13 2004 at 4:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591807033282
5 posts
Located(715, 680, 35) in Erudin Palace not Erudin proper.

Not on Craftkeeper, Gatecaller, Crimsonhand, Deepwater Knigh
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2003 at 8:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761122424
2 posts
I have max faction with all the above and he is still ready to attack my iksar necro.

Since he gives out the newbie armor quests this must be a bug. He should be on Craftkeepers or at least High Counsil of Erudin.
